title: [BUG] Unable to specify a note in a cell within a table
author: papb

comments.author: EtienneDel
comments.body: Got the same behavior, did you found the issue ?

comments.author: rheidari
comments.body:
I think this is due to the order of which exceljs is writing the worksheet nodes. `legacyDrawing` should come before `tableParts`.

https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/documentformat.openxml.spreadsheet.worksheet?view=openxml-2.8.1

comments.author: papb
comments.body: Hi @rheidari, nice! Thank you! Do you have any knowledge of the exceljs codebase, is it easy to switch the order?

comments.author: rheidari
comments.body:
Should be pretty simple, just reordering here so that `legacyDrawing` is being output just after `drawing`.

https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/65ea2e4a52343362e4a7309bf961611392dd6a4a/lib/xlsx/xform/sheet/worksheet-xform.js#L329-L342

comments.author: papb
comments.body: Nice, thank you very much. I will try it later and comment here if it worked.

comments.author: shachargiladi
comments.body: Hey, did you managed to solve this thing? I cant get it to work even after the fix that was mentioned here, any advice?

comments.author: ShraddhaJ11
comments.body: Hi @rheidari , After applying your solution comments are appearing but table formatting is getting remove. Did you face similar issue and do you have any solution for this ?

comments.author: ctaschereau
comments.body: @rheidari any idea how one could help with this issue and contribute a pull request?

comments.author: rheidari
comments.body:
> @rheidari any idea how one could help with this issue and contribute a pull request?

@ctaschereau it looks like in your commit you didn't also move picture to be below legacyDrawing (legacyDrawing must be directly after drawing). I'm working on a PR now.

comments.author: AbhinanduReddy
comments.body: Is this issue resolved? I'm still facing this issue

comments.author: gbshhennsi
comments.body: Any news on this? Will this library ever be updated?
